ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "wb_income" TEXT /* World Bank income classification (e.g., High income, Low income) */,
  "wb_region" TEXT /* World Bank region (e.g., East Asia & Pacific, Europe & Central Asia) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Defense & Space, Computer Hardware) */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the industry is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the industry data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Manufacturing, Services) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the sector is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sector data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sectors" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the sector is the primary sector for the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, Inflation Rate) */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each economic indicator */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the economic indicator */,
  "is_key_indicator" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the indicator is a key indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the value was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id", "country_code", "industry_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_values" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the value was recorded */,
  "net_value" REAL /* Net value of the industry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the net value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "industry_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_industries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage contribution of the industry to the country's economy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_indicators" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the indicator is primary for the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id", "indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_indicators" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the indicator is primary for the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_indicators" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the indicator is primary for the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id", "indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_industry" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the industry is primary for the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sector_indicators" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the indicator is primary for the industry-sector relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id", "sector_id", "indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_sector_indicators" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the indicator is primary for the country-sector relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "sector_id", "indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_industry_indicators" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the indicator is primary for the country-industry relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "industry_id", "indicator_id")
)
